hero.heading: AML Screening That Catches Everything.
hero.description: AI-powered sanctions screening with 6-layer matching, {{listCount}} global lists, and configurable fuzzy search. Built for banks that demand zero missed hits.

features.title: Enterprise-Grade Features
features.subtitle: Purpose-built for compliance teams who need zero missed hits and zero false positives.
features.ai_pipeline_desc: Advanced fuzzy matching across transliterations and phonetic variations with machine learning.
features.sanctions_lists_desc: OFAC, UN, EU, UK, and OpenSanctions integrated. Always updated with new designations.
features.fuzzy_search_desc: Tune sensitivity from strict to lenient matching. Zero false negatives with minimal false positives.
features.latency_desc: Sub-50ms p99 latency target for real-time screening at scale.
features.explainable_desc: Every match includes confidence scores, reasoning, and audit trails for compliance.
features.multilang_desc: Automatic transcription and phonetic normalization across Latin, Cyrillic, Arabic, and more.

demo.heading: See It In Action
demo.hint: Try: Mohammed Al-Rashidi, Donald Trump, Vladimir Putin
demo.no_matches_sub: Screened against OFAC, UN, EU, and 12 other lists

pricing.title: Five Powerful Products
pricing.subtitle: Mix and match. Start simple, scale fast. No setup fees.

bundle.title: Bundle & Save 15%
bundle.description: Use multiple AMLIQ products together? Bundle them for 15% off your total monthly spend.

enterprise.heading: Need Unlimited Scale?
enterprise.description: Custom list management, on-premise deployment, dedicated support, and SLA guarantees.
enterprise.note: Designed for tier-1 financial institutions and global compliance teams.

items.description: A compliance team screens new customers during onboarding using 6-layer matching to catch transliteration and phonetic variations across multiple sanctions lists.
An AML operations team runs nightly batch screening of transaction counterparties, leveraging configurable fuzzy thresholds to balance coverage with analyst workload.
A payments processor integrates the screening API into their payment flow, using sub-50ms latency targets to screen without delaying transaction processing.

items.a: All plans include OFAC, UN, EU, UK, and OpenSanctions. Professional and Enterprise plans include {{listCount}}+ specialized lists.
Built with security-first architecture. Encryption at rest and in transit. Designed for regulatory compliance with full audit trails.

items.q: Can I integrate AMLIQ with my systems?
items.a: Yes, REST API with webhooks, SDKs for Python/Node.js/Go, and native integrations with Salesforce, Slack, and more.
Email support (Starter), priority support (Professional), and dedicated CSM (Enterprise).
Yes, Enterprise customers can deploy on-premise, air-gapped, or in a private cloud.
99.9% uptime target. Enterprise plans include priority support with dedicated response times.

footer.tagline: AI-powered AML screening for banks that demand zero missed hits.
